title: PDF Viewer intrinsic zoom — sharp + less lag (dbg82)
description:
PDF Viewer no longer zooms via CSS transform:scale on the whole world (that was upscaling low-res bitmaps = blurry text). Zoom now resizes page layout directly and re-rasterizes visible pages at up to 600×zoom DPI after a short debounce.

Map workspace unchanged. Hard-refresh PipeSync (dbg82).
changeLog: Viewer: intrinsic layout zoom (no CSS world scale blur).
Debounced re-raster — visible pages only (fixes zoom lag on large PDFs).
600 DPI base + effDpi scales with zoom for microscope letter clarity.
